title: French New Wave Minimalist Lovers Scene AI
sourceTitle: French New Wave Minimalist Lovers Scene AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Black-and-white French New Wave minimalist lovers scene set on empty Parisian side street after light rain, expressing 1950s-1960s European cinema tone inspired by Godard and Truffaut: anti-dramatic, observational, poetic realism, human fragility, art-house melancholy, and restrained romance. Black-and-white tonal range with soft greys, through stillness and proximity. Subject: A couple stands close but not touching, wearing her trench coat and knit scarf, his wool coat and open collar shirt; the woman leans slightly toward the man while he looks past her, with natural faces and understated authentic expressions. Scene: empty Parisian side street after light rain with sparse European street details such as stacked cafe chairs, bicycle, stone walls, shuttered windows, or early morning overcast stillness. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Preserved french new wave minimalist lovers scene source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Emotional Tone: unfinished conversation and quiet longing. Style: 1950s-1960s European cinema tone inspired by Godard and Truffaut: anti-dramatic, observational, poetic realism, human fragility, art-house melancholy, and restrained romance. Color Palette: Black-and-white tonal range with soft greys, natural skin tones translated into monochrome, gentle street shadows, and subtle film-grain contrast. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Static camera, eye-level framing, subtle 35mm film grain, slight imperfection, and enough distance to preserve the silent relational tension. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
